answers: Popular webtoons: Tower of God, Lore Olympus, UnOrdinary, True Beauty, Solo Leveling, The Beginning After the End.
Read webtoons on LINE Webtoon app (free, official) or Tapas. Scroll vertically — designed for phone reading.
Webtoon vs manga: webtoons are digital-first, full color, vertical scroll. Manga is print-first, black & white, page-by-page.
Webtoon ki: digital comics from Korea. Full color, free to read, updated weekly. Available in Webtoon app.
